description_long: This is a charming tea set arranged on a square, colorful floral-patterned mat. The set includes two teapots and three teacups, all crafted from a smooth, glazed ceramic with a soft cream base and delicate painted motifs in blue and green. The teapots feature rounded bodies, gently curved spouts, and looped handles, each topped with a domed lid in a pale green hue. The cups are similarly styled, with matching painted accents and a simple, open form. The floral mat beneath the set is vibrant, with red, yellow, green, and blue flowers creating a lively contrast to the subtle tones of the ceramic pieces. This ensemble evokes a sense of hospitality and is visually inviting, suitable for both decorative and functional use.
description: A ceramic tea set with two teapots and three cups, all decorated with soft floral motifs, arranged on a colorful flower-patterned mat.
description_view_0: Front view showing both teapots and all three cups clearly arranged on the floral mat.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the handles and spouts of the teapots, with the cups partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the backs of the teapots and the open interiors of the cups.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the spouts and handles from a different perspective, with the cups more separated.
attribute_spout_orientation: Curved spouts extending outward and slightly upward from the front of each teapot.
attribute_handle_design: Looped handles attached at the top and bottom of the teapot body, moderately thick and rounded for easy gripping.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; domed lids with small central knobs, fitting snugly on top.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Floral motifs in blue and green on the teapots and cups, with a multicolored floral mat underneath.
